response.justification: The candidate brings 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and demonstrates genuine builder instincts through open source projects and community education. However, the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized expertise in AI platforms, and the candidate's AI exposure is limited to a few months in the current role focused on tooling rather than strategy or product. There is no ML/AI academic background, no cloud platform depth, and no evidence of advising customers or partners at a strategic level — the core competencies the role requires.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering experience across a wide range of stacks and domains, demonstrating sustained technical depth
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, built and shipped multiple open source libraries and platforms independently
Active knowledge-sharing through public workshops and conference talks, showing an ability to communicate technical ideas externally
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — MCP tooling work started April 2025; no ML/AI products, research, or platforms built with AI prior to that
Current and previous titles are Staff/Senior Software Engineer, not at the director-level IC seniority this role requires
Cloud experience is incidental (AWS CDK for pricing logic, Kubernetes for a hobby platform) rather than deep cloud architecture or platform strategy
